jobs.title: Junior Developer
jobs.description: A Junior Developer who can work on Front-end side. He/She should be fluent with Javascript, HTML, CSS.

jobs.title: Senior Developer
jobs.description: The person should be able to understand the project requirements and distribute tasks to junior developers.
jobs.requirements: Should have experience of at least 2+ years

jobs.title: Receptionist
jobs.description: Need to be able to communicate with all clients on behalf of managers and prepare daily schedules as well a log for them daily.
jobs.requirements: Communication skills and Management skills are a must.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Build responsive user interfaces for our hiring platform using Vue.js and Tailwind CSS. You will collaborate closely with design and backend teams to ship polished product features.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years of frontend development experience, strong JavaScript fundamentals, and experience building production web applications.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Design and maintain scalable backend services, APIs, and database workflows for a growing recruitment product. The role involves improving system performance and collaborating with frontend developers on feature delivery.
jobs.requirements: Experience with Node.js or PHP, database design, API development, and debugging production issues.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Create user flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity interfaces for candidate and recruiter experiences. You will help improve usability across dashboards, job applications, and ATS tooling.
jobs.requirements: Portfolio demonstrating web app design, proficiency in Figma, and a solid grasp of accessibility and information architecture.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Intern
jobs.description: Support reporting on recruiter engagement, application conversion, and ATS score patterns. This internship is a good fit for someone who enjoys cleaning data and presenting insights clearly.
jobs.requirements: Basic SQL knowledge, comfort with spreadsheets, and strong analytical thinking. Python experience is a plus.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Improve deployment pipelines, monitoring, and cloud infrastructure for our internal and customer-facing systems. You will work on automation, uptime, and release confidence across the team.
jobs.requirements: Hands-on experience with CI/CD, Docker, cloud platforms, and infrastructure troubleshooting.

applications.resumeText: I know vue.js tailwind css and html
applications.coverLetter: i have worked as mentor for 2 new interns and now i want to try being head and helping everyone out, as well be a guide and medium of understanding work to them.

applications.resumeText: I know javascript, html and basic pinia
applications.coverLetter: I am waiting to gain this amazing experience

applications.resumeText: I have learnt about Pinia store
applications.coverLetter: I want to join you and grow together

applications.resumeText: Bytefury LLP  Date: 16-01-2025  To  The Head  Department of Computer Science M K Bhavnagar University Bhavnagar  Subject: Joining Report for MCA Project Work (Jan-2026 to Apr-2026) Sir,  We are pleased to inform you that, we have permitted following students of Department of Computer Science, M K Bhavnagar University to carry out their MCA project work:  -   Shreya Shah 5109240022  Details of the project are given below:  1.   Title of the project : CareerLink  2.   Project Guide : Yogesh Gohil  3.   Contact Number:   7016091727  4.   Email-id :   yogesh@bytefury.com  5.   Duration of the project work: Jan-2026 to Apr-2026  Tools, Technology and project definition is attached herewith in separate sheets.  Signature of the student:   Signature of the Guide:  Name of the student: Shreya Shah   Name of the Guide: Yogesh Gohil  Stamp of Company Tools, Technology and Project Definition  Project Title:  CareerLink – Recruitment Management System  Project Definition:  The Smart Placement & Internship Management System is a web-based recruitment platform designed to connect job seekers and recruiters through a single digital system. It enables applicants to create profiles and upload their resumes, while recruiters can post job or internship openings and review applications efficiently.  The system supports resume screening by providing an ATS-based score for applicants, helping them understand the strength of their resumes. Recruiters can use these ATS scores to sort and shortlist resumes quickly and effectively.  Tools & Technology Stack  Frontend  ●   Vue.js   – For building a reactive Single-Page Application user interface.  ●   Tailwind CSS   – For styling and responsive design.  Backend  ●   PHP   – Core language for server-side logic.  Development Tools  ●   Visual Studio Code   – Code editor for development.  ●   GitHub   – Version control system and code repository
applications.coverLetter: I want to join and grow along with company
